text-stone-400","children":[["$","$L7",null,{"href":"/authors/tom-hadley","className":"flex items-center gap-2 group","children":[["$","img",null,{"src":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1500648767791-00dcc994a43e?w=400&h=400&fit=crop&auto=format&q=80","alt":"Tom Hadley","className":"w-8 h-8 rounded-full object-cover object-top"}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","p",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-stone-700 dark:text-stone-200 text-sm group-hover:text-orange-600 transition-colors","children":"Tom Hadley"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xs text-stone-400","children":"Ergonomics Specialist"}]]}]]}],["$","span",null,{"className":"flex items-center gap-1","children":[["$","$L6",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 6v6l4 2","key":"mmk7yg"}]],"className":"lucide-clock","size":13}]," ","7 min read"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"November 29, 2025"}]]}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-10 pb-16","children":[["$","article",null,{"className":"lg:col-span-2","children":[["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xl text-stone-600 leading-relaxed mb-6 font-medium pl-4 border-l-4 border-orange-500","children":"Corner desks offer more surface area than any straight desk at the same price point. But the extra space comes with ergonomic trade-offs that most setups ignore. Here is how to do it right."}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xs text-stone-500 dark:text-stone-400 mb-8 p-3 rounded-lg bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-900 border border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-800","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Affiliate disclosure:"}]," This post may contain affiliate links to products we recommend. We earn a small commission when you buy through them, at no extra cost to you. As an Amazon Associate we earn from qualifying purchases. See our ",["$","$L7",null,{"href":"/disclaimer","className":"text-orange-600 dark:text-orange-400 hover:underline","children":"disclaimer"}]," for details."]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"prose","children":[["$","h2","0",{"id":"why-corner-desks-make-sense","children":"Why Corner Desks Make Sense"}],["$","p","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"A corner desk (L-shaped desk) offers more surface area than a straight desk of the same wall footprint. In a room with two walls available, a corner desk uses space that would otherwise be wasted."}}],"$L29","$L2a","$L2b","$L2c","$L2d","$L2e","$L2f","$L30","$L31","$L32","$L33","$L34","$L35","$L36","$L37","$L38","$L39","$L3a","$L3b","$L3c","$L3d","$L3e","$L3f","$L40","$L41"]}],"$L42","$L43","$L44"]}],"$L45"]}]]}]
46:I[94097,["/_next/static/chunks/0wjbooevnfpw4.js","/_next/static/chunks/0wu484j-81s3l.js"],"default"]
47:I[24170,["/_next/static/chunks/0wjbooevnfpw4.js","/_next/static/chunks/0wu484j-81s3l.js"],"default"]
48:I[55132,["/_next/static/chunks/0wjbooevnfpw4.js","/_next/static/chunks/0wu484j-81s3l.js"],"default"]
:HL["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1518455027359-f3f8164ba6bd?w=1200&h=800&fit=crop&auto=format&q=80","image"]
:HL["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1497366216548-37526070297c?w=1200&h=800&fit=crop&auto=format&q=80","image"]
29:["$","p","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The practical benefits: separate zones for primary and secondary work, space for reference materials without cluttering the main work surface, and a natural physical separation between tasks (computer on one arm, writing and reading on the other)."}}]
2a:["$","p","3",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The ergonomic challenge: the corner creates temptation to sit facing the corner, which means turning your neck to look at a monitor placed on either arm. Done wrong, a corner desk causes exactly the neck and shoulder problems it could prevent."}}]
2b:["$","h2","4",{"id":"monitor-placement-the-critical-decision","children":"Monitor Placement: The Critical Decision"}]
2c:["$","p","5",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>The wrong way</strong>: monitor placed in the corner, keyboard in front of it, body facing the corner. This forces you to look slightly upward into the corner all day and offers no neck relief."}}]
2d:["$","p","6",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>The right way</strong>: place your primary monitor on one arm of the L, directly in front of where you sit. Your body faces that arm. The corner and the other arm become secondary space — reference materials, a second monitor at an angle, a notebook."}}]
2e:["$","p","7",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"This means sitting at the junction of the L but offset toward one arm, not centred in the corner."}}]
2f:["$","h2","8",{"id":"ergonomic-sitting-position","children":"Ergonomic Sitting Position"}]
30:["$","p","9",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"On an L-shaped desk, the temptation is to slide your chair into the corner so you can reach both arms without moving. Resist this. Sitting in the corner means your primary monitor is to the side, not in front — which causes neck rotation all day."}}]
31:["$","p","10",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The correct position: chair placed in front of one arm. That arm is your primary work surface. The other arm is within reach for secondary tasks without being your constant visual focus."}}]
32:["$","h2","11",{"id":"using-the-two-zones","children":"Using the Two Zones"}]
33:["$","p","12",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The most productive corner desk setups use the two zones intentionally:"}}]
34:["$","p","13",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Primary arm</strong>: monitor, keyboard, mouse. This is where focused work happens."}}]
35:["$","p","14",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Secondary arm</strong>: notebook and pen for handwriting, reference documents, a second monitor if needed, or a laptop in clamshell mode. This is where reference and planning happen."}}]
36:["$","p","15",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Moving physically between the two zones — rotating the chair, reaching across — provides micro-movement during the day, which is a genuine ergonomic benefit of the corner desk format."}}]
37:["$","h2","16",{"id":"cable-management-on-corner-desks","children":"Cable Management on Corner Desks"}]
38:["$","p","17",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Corner desks have more cable challenges than straight desks because cables need to span the corner. The options:"}}]
39:["$","ul","18",{"children":[["$","li","0",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"A grommet hole in the corner of the desk surface routes cables cleanly down to the floor"}}],["$","li","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"A corner-mounted under-desk cable tray holds the power strip at the corner where it can reach both arms"}}],["$","li","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"A USB-C dock placed at the corner reduces individual cable runs from both sides"}}]]}]
3a:["$","h2","19",{"id":"best-corner-desks","children":"Best Corner Desks"}]
3b:["$","p","20",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Budget</strong>: IKEA BEKANT corner desk (~£300). Adequate surface quality, simple frame, available in several sizes. The corner grommet hole is a genuine feature at this price."}}]
3c:["$","p","21",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Mid-range</strong>: Flexispot E1L Electric L-Shaped Desk (~£500). Motorised height adjustment in an L-shaped configuration. Rare feature at this price — most electric desks are straight."}}]
3d:["$","p","22",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Premium</strong>: Uplift L-Shaped Standing Desk (~£900). The most stable electric L-shaped desk available. If you work at a corner desk for six or more hours daily, the standing option is worth the premium."}}]
3e:["$","h2","23",{"id":"the-corner-as-dead-space","children":"The Corner as Dead Space"}]
3f:["$","p","24",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The actual corner of an L-shaped desk — the junction — is often dead space. It is too far from either seated position to be useful for active work, and monitors placed there create the neck rotation problem described above."}}]
40:["$","p","25",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Use the corner for: a desk plant, a monitor arm base, or a docking station. Do not place active work items here."}}]
41:["$","p","26",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"For the full ergonomic positioning guide that applies to any desk shape, see our <a href=\"/blog/ergonomic-home-office-setup-guide\" class=\"text-orange-600 dark:text-orange-400 hover:underline font-medium\">ergonomic home office setup guide</a>."}}]
42:["$","div",null,{"className":"mt-10 pt-8 border-t border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-800 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"text-sm font-medium text-stone-500 dark:text-stone-400","children":"Topic:"}],["$","$L7",null,{"href":"/blog?category=Workspace","className":"text-sm font-semibold px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 hover:opacity-80 transition-opacity","children":"Workspace"}],[["$","$L7","corner-desk",{"href":"/blog/tag/corner-desk","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","corner-desk"]}],["$","$L7","l-shaped-desk",{"href":"/blog/tag/l-shaped-desk","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","l-shaped-desk"]}],["$","$L7","setup-guide",{"href":"/blog/tag/setup-guide","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","setup-guide"]}],["$","$L7","ergonomics",{"href":"/blog/tag/ergonomics","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","ergonomics"]}],["$","$L7","workspace",{"href":"/blog/tag/workspace","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","workspace"]}]]]}]
43:["$","$L46",null,{"title":"Corner Desk Setup Guide: How to Make the Most of an L-Shaped Workspace","slug":"corner-desk-setup-guide"}]
44:["$","div",null,{"className":"print:hidden","children":["$","$L47",null,{}]}]

4a:I[27201,["/_next/static/chunks/01xlw8hd842-c.js","/_next/static/chunks/0d3shmwh5_nmn.js"],"IconMark"]

Here is how to do it right."}],["$","link","2",{"rel":"manifest","href":"/manifest.webmanifest","crossOrigin":"$undefined"}],["$","link","3",{"rel":"canonical","href":"https://deskbly.com/blog/corner-desk-setup-guide"}],["$","meta","4",{"property":"og:title","content":"Corner Desk Setup Guide: How to Make the Most of an L-Shaped Workspace"}],["$","meta","5",{"property":"og:description","content":"Corner desks offer more surface area than any straight desk at the same price point. Here is how to do it right."}],["$","meta","6",{"property":"og:url","content":"https://deskbly.com/blog/corner-desk-setup-guide"}],["$","meta","7",{"property":"og:image","content":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1593642632559-0c6d3fc62b89?w=1200&h=800&fit=crop&auto=format&q=80"}],["$","meta","8",{"property":"og:image:width","content":"1200"}],["$","meta","9",{"property":"og:image:height","content":"800"}],["$","meta","10",{"property":"og:image:alt","content":"Corner Desk Setup Guide: How to Make the Most of an L-Shaped Workspace"}],["$","meta","11",{"property":"og:type","content":"article"}],["$","meta","12",{"property":"article:published_time","content":"2025-11-29"}],["$","meta","13",{"property":"article:modified_time","content":"2025-11-29"}],["$","meta","14",{"property":"article:author","content":"Tom Hadley"}],["$","meta","15",{"property":"article:section","content":"Workspace"}],["$","meta","16",{"property":"article:tag","content":"corner-desk"}],["$","meta","17",{"property":"article:tag","content":"l-shaped-desk"}],["$","meta","18",{"property":"article:tag","content":"setup-guide"}],["$","meta","19",{"property":"article:tag","content":"ergonomics"}],["$","meta","20",{"property":"article:tag","content":"workspace"}],["$","meta","21",{"name":"twitter:card","content":"summary_large_image"}],["$","meta","22",{"name":"twitter:title","content":"Corner Desk Setup Guide: How to Make the Most of an L-Shaped Workspace"}],["$","meta","23",{"name":"twitter:description","content":"Corner desks offer more surface area than any straight desk at the same price point.
